notableEvents.label: Bo Bichette GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bo Bichette grounds into a double play, first baseman Matt Olson to second baseman Ozzie Albies. Juan Soto out at 2nd. Bo Bichette out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Alvarez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Jorge Mateo to first baseman Matt Olson. Eric Wagaman out at 2nd. Francisco Alvarez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Alvarez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez hit by pitch. Eric Wagaman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: A.J. Ewing pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: A.J. Ewing flies out to left fielder Mauricio Dubón.

notableEvents.label: Ronny Mauricio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ronny Mauricio strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Jared Young pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jared Young pops out to second baseman Ozzie Albies.

notableEvents.label: A.J. Ewing pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: A.J. Ewing grounds out, second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson.

notableEvents.label: Austin Riley plunked
notableEvents.detail: Austin Riley hit by pitch. Drake Baldwin to 3rd. Matt Olson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Juan Soto reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Ozzie Albies. Francisco Lindor to 2nd. Francisco Lindor advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Ozzie Albies.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski homers (5) on a fly ball to right field. Michael Harris II scores.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski singles on a line drive to right fielder Carson Benge.
